SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CONTINUED TO MAY-12-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01

2:30 PM COURT CALLED TO ORDER. ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT ALBERTINAH MKHIZE. ON THURSDAY, MAY 11, 1995, DEFENDANT MKHIZE WAS PRESENT AT A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH JUDGE PRO TEM PALM AND ATTORNEY MARGULIES. MS. MKHIZE WAS CONCERNED WITH HER OPTIONS AND ASKED FOR A ONE DAY CONTINUANCE. SHE WANTED THE TIME TO DISCUSS HER OPTIONS WITH HER FAMILY AND FRIENDS. ALL PARTIES AGREED TO THE CONTINUANCE. ON FRIDAY, MAY 12, L995, AT 2 PM, DEFENDANT MKHIZE FAILED TO APPEAR IN DEPT. 1. AROUND 2:20PM, ATTORNEY MARGULIES WENT THROUGH THE BUILDING AT 633 FOLSOM LOOKING FOR HER UNSUCCESSFULLY. DEFENDANT MKHIZE WAS NOT PRESENT FOR THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WHICH HAD BEEN CONTINUED ON HER BEHALF. ATTORNEY MARGULIES WILL MOVE THE COURT TO VACATE DEFENDANT'S DEMAND FOR JURY TRIAL AND WILL ASK THAT THE MATTER PRECEED AS A COURT TRIAL.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MKHIZE, ALBERTINAH
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MKHIZE, ALBERTINAH

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MKHIZE, ALBERTINAH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 55 CHUMASERO DRIVE, #8F, SAN FRANCISCO, STAYED UNTIL JUN-30-1995, LEASE FORFEITED
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT MKHIZE, ALBERTINAH
